overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The character travels from an open plaza near an NCPD building, through a covered underpass, and into dense urban streets with towering megastructures and holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza in front of NCPD headquarters with crosswalk

events.description: character turns left and begins crossing the street toward the NCPD building

agents.ego_description: walking through a busy urban plaza and crossing the street toward the NCPD building entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair walking in same direction ahead of the player

entered.detail: large blue and white futuristic police building with NCPD signage
multi-level highway structure with vehicles passing overhead
bright holographic advertisements and corporate signage on building facades
tropical palm trees lining the street median
small vendor stall with green neon lighting
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright, sunlit cyberpunk city plaza dominated by the massive NCPD headquarters building. The character walks forward through moderate crowds and crosses a marked crosswalk, with elevated highways and neon billboards visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass beneath NCPD building with graffiti walls

events.description: character enters the covered underpass beneath the NCPD building, transitioning from bright sunlight to artificial blue lighting
passing deeper into the underpass where blue fluorescent lights dominate the illumination

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered pedestrian underpass beneath the NCPD structure, passing by graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: shirtless male pedestrian with tattoos walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large concrete entrance ramp leading under the NCPD building
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti including the word 'Vandals' in green
massive structural pillars supporting the overhead building
blue-white fluorescent lighting strips along the ceiling
scattered garbage bags and litter on the concrete ground

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a covered underpass beneath the NCPD building, where the bright daylight gives way to cool blue artificial lighting. The walls are covered in graffiti and trash debris litters the concrete floor as sparse pedestrians walk through the enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with vending machines transitioning to open street

events.description: exiting the dark underpass into a covered walkway with pink neon vending machines
emerging from covered area back into direct sunlight and open urban space

agents.ego_description: walking through a transitional covered walkway and exiting back into the open city streets

entered.detail: futuristic vending machine emitting bright pink neon light
massive digital billboard displaying a cartoon character holding a product
overhead concrete structure providing partial cover

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian walkway lined with pink neon vending machines, transitioning from the enclosed underpass back toward open city streets. A large cartoon billboard becomes visible ahead as natural sunlight gradually replaces the artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with neon bars and commercial storefronts

events.description: character looks upward to view the towering skyscrapers and overhead structures
turning corner onto a street with a prominent purple neon bar facade

agents.ego_description: walking along city streets while looking up at the massive architecture and neon signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in long coat walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: storefront with intense purple neon lighting and bar stools
ground floor commercial establishments with various signage
public waste containers and debris on the sidewalk
bright orange safety railings along street edges

segments.scene_description: The character explores a bustling urban street lined with commercial buildings, including a striking purple neon bar. The camera pans upward to reveal the massive scale of the surrounding megastructures and elevated highways, with moderate pedestrian traffic moving along the sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street approaching Caliente building with towering residential towers

events.description: approaching the Caliente building with its distinctive orange neon signage
camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and steam vents above

agents.ego_description: walking toward a gated area near the Caliente building while looking up at the massive towers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian entering the gated area ahead

entered.detail: green and gray building with prominent orange 'CALIENTE' neon signage
black metal fence blocking vehicle access to the street
tall apartment buildings with red and blue accent lighting
steam emissions rising from street-level vents
massive mega-towers extending high above the street level

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character approaching the Caliente building in a narrower urban street, passing through a metal security gate. Steam rises from street vents as the camera looks up at the immense residential towers and megastructures that dominate the skyline, creating a canyon-like atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open city plaza into the claustrophobic depths of a neon-lit urban canyon. It begins in the sunlit expanse of an NCPD headquarters plaza, moving through crowds and across a crosswalk beneath elevated highways. As the character descends into a covered underpass, the natural light shifts to cool blue artificial tones amidst graffiti-covered walls and concrete debris, before transitioning through a pedestrian walkway lined with pink neon vending machines. The scene then opens back into the daylight of a bustling commercial street featuring a purple neon bar, where the camera pans upward to reveal the staggering scale of surrounding megastructures. Finally, the movement leads through a metal security gate into a narrower street filled with rising steam, ending with a view of the immense residential towers of the Caliente building that loom overhead.
